text:
Once upon a time, in Little Elm, there lived a cat named Luna. Luna was orange with big, curious eyes. She had a best friend named Old Dewey who loved singing old songs.

Every morning, Old Dewey would serenade Luna with his crooning voice. One day, Old Dewey fell down a well. Luna searched tirelessly for her singing buddy. After a long time down there, Old Dewey was rescued by a curious goldfish. Luna came back home to find Old Dewey slightly different – his voice no longer sang.

Luna and Old Dewey had adventures exploring the forest. They found a secret pond where they could listen to river fish chat about everything under the sun. Old Dewey sometimes sang to them instead of Luna, and they seemed to appreciate it.

One day, while they were playing near a old oak tree, a giant owl swooped down. The owl wanted to keep Old Dewey all for himself.
